form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming finished fifth of 18 runners at Thurles on January 29 over 3218m, on a wet track; 13 len behind El Cairos carrying 68.5kg at $13. form.formComment: Having second run back today. First-up after five months finished fifth of 15 starters at this track on March 26 over 3822m, on slow going 14 len behind Potters Pal carrying 69kg at $4. Previously second-up finished sixth of 9 runners at Kilbeggan on June 1 over 4123m, 29 len behind She's A Fine Wine carrying 61kg at $12. Will strip fitter and makes plenty of appeal.
